footer.tagline: Care with love, watch it grow.

home.titulo: Care with love, watch it grow
home.subtitulo: Discover the care each plant needs and track the health of your own, all in one place.

busca.placeholder: Search a plant by name (e.g. pothos, cactus...)

catalogo.subtitulo: Search any species and see its full care sheet.
catalogo.vazioComBusca: Try searching a different common or scientific name.
catalogo.vazioSemBusca: Couldn't load the catalog right now.

ficha.naoEncontradaDesc: This species wasn't found in the catalog.

sobre.paragrafo1: Brotinho came from a simple problem: people who care for plants at home don't have a central place to check each species' care and remember the watering routine.
sobre.creditos: Project built for the Frontend Web Development course — UFRN/ECT, by Viviane Stephane Pinheiro Novo.
